items.title: The government is the real price gouger
items.desc: Businesses have no power to coerce people and can price only as high as the market will bear. For the government, though, the sky’s the limit.

items.title: US State Department Says Approved $108M Sale of Equipment for HAWK System to Ukraine
items.desc: The US State Department said it had approved a potential $108 million sale of HAWK air defense system maintenance equipment to Ukraine.

items.title: Russia, US Bear Special Responsibility for World's Fate - Ryabkov
items.desc: Russia and the United States, as the largest nuclear powers, bear a special responsibility for the fate of the world, Russian Deputy Foreign Minister Sergey Ryabkov said.

items.title: Two Yubari Melons Fetch Record $36,500
items.desc: The season's first auction for Yubari melons, a signature specialty of Yubari in Hokkaido, was held at the Sapporo Central Wholesale Market on Friday morning, with a pair of the premium melons fetching a record 5.8 million yen. (News On Japan)

items.title: Navy's acting secretary says Taiwan arms sale put on "pause" over Iran war
items.desc: The acting secretary of the U.S. Navy said Thursday that arm sales to Taiwan had been put on "pause" to ensure that the American military had sufficient munitions for its Iran operations.
